game_info.title: Vertical Venture
game_info.concept:
Downwell is a curious game about a young boy venturing down a well in search of untold treasures with only his Gunboots to protect him.  Make your way further and further down into the darkness filled with nasty creatures and mysterious secrets to collect the spectacular red gems scattered about the rocks.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/downwell/id1032708262

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Downwell is a curious game about a young boy venturing down a well in search of untold treasures with only his Gunboots to protect him. Make your way further and further down into the darkness filled with nasty creatures and mysterious secrets to collect the spectacular red gems scattered about the rocks. Step into precariously placed shops and buy some helpful items or level up between levels to battle well-dwelling monsters and uncover hidden caves filled with riches and relics. No two trips down the well are ever the same!

Simple, Responsive Controls - Designed for mobile from the ground up, Downwell is presented with intuitive and elegant controls that allow for action-packed gameplay using just three buttons.

The Amazing Gunboots - The fashionable and lethal Gunboots allow players to unleash a torrent of firepower on the nasty creatures dwelling in the well and slow your decent with each shot. 

Unique Weapons & Items - Get different weapons, shop for peculiar items and obtain powerful upgrades that all stack and affect the way you play!

A New Adventure Every Time - Each level in Downwell is procedurally generated, so no two trips down the well are ever the same providing a fresh new adventure each time!

Music by Eirik Suhrke. 
Sound Design by Joonas Turner.
game_info.description: Vertical Venture is a high-octane vertical scrolling action game where you plummet down a treacherous procedurally generated well. Armed with your trusty Gunboots, you must blast your way through rock and monster alike. Your Gunboots not only destroy enemies but also slow your descent with every shot, allowing you to maneuver through tight spaces. Collect red gems to boost your score, manage your ammo which recharges only upon touching the ground, and survive as long as you can to reach the bottom of the abyss.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move horizontally
- Space: Jump (from ground) or Shoot Gunboots (in air)
- Z: Shoot Gunboots (alternative)
- Shift: Hold to fall faster (reduce air resistance)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Gameplay Stability Test. This test verifies that the game loads, the player can move, shoot, and physics interactions (gravity, collisions) function without crashing.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will generate random movement inputs and periodic shooting actions. It will attempt to keep the player within the horizontal bounds of the canvas.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game runs for at least 30 seconds without errors. The player entity's position updates, projectiles are spawned, and the game state logs reflect active gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Survival and Win Condition Test. This test aims to reach a significant depth to verify level generation and difficulty scaling.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller uses a heuristic approach: it tracks the nearest platform to land on to recharge ammo, targets enemies directly below the player to shoot them, and avoids taking damage by slowing descent.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player survives past a depth of 1000 units or triggers a win condition if applicable. The score should reflect collected gems and defeated enemies.
